title: Implantation Begins
subtitle: A new life finds its place
description: In week 4, the fertilized egg implants into the lining of the uterus. This marks the official beginning of pregnancy, and your body starts producing hormones to support early development.
what_to_expect: Implantation of the fertilized egg into the uterine lining
Hormone hCG begins to be produced
Early signs like mild cramping or light spotting may occur
care_tips: Continue eating balanced and nutritious meals
Avoid alcohol, smoking, and harmful substances
Get adequate rest and avoid excessive physical strain

medical_checkups.note: This is the stage when pregnancy can begin to be detected.

commonly_suggested.name: Pregnancy Test
commonly_suggested.purpose: Detects hCG hormone to confirm pregnancy

commonly_suggested.name: Doctor Consultation
commonly_suggested.purpose: Confirms pregnancy and begins early guidance

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may recommend further tests based on your health condition and confirmation results.

important_note: Implantation is a critical step that allows the pregnancy to establish and begin developing.
reassurance: A small but significant step has been taken — your journey has officially begun.
medical_disclaimer: Always consult your healthcare provider for confirmation and personalized medical advice.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels supports proper implantation and early development.
care_tips: Avoid sugary and highly processed foods
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be closely reviewed after pregnancy confirmation.
diabetes.reassurance: Stable habits can help support a healthy start.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron levels help support early pregnancy changes and energy levels.
care_tips: Include iron-rich foods in your meals
Pair iron with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Iron levels may be checked during early pregnancy tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps your body adapt better.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure supports proper implantation and early pregnancy development.
care_tips: Maintain a calm and stress-free routine
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure may be monitored after confirmation.
hypertension.reassurance: Calm and consistent care supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels are important for supporting early hormonal changes.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid levels may be reviewed early in pregnancy.
thyroid.reassurance: Keeping things steady helps support healthy development.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As pregnancy begins, managing multiple conditions with consistency becomes especially important.
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: With steady care, you can support a strong and healthy beginning.
